title: calamintha alpina var. elatior
intro: Calamintha alpina var. elatior, also known as mountain balm or alpine calamint, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Calamintha alpina var. elatior include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, while also providing relief from headaches and menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
